artifact_json.summary: Final-review dependency startup issue addressed by launching the kind NiceGUI web app through uv run instead of plain python, allowing script metadata to provide NiceGUI in the reused MCP image.
tasks_completed: Changed the kind web app deployment launcher from plain python to uv run so scripts/web_app_hub.py installs and uses its PEP 723 NiceGUI dependency metadata at startup.
Preserved the existing scion-ops-mcp image, service identity, ports, probes, workspace mount, Hub/MCP environment, grove id setup, and RBAC resources.
Added a focused regression test that asserts the kind web app deployment uses uv run for the NiceGUI script launch path.
tests_run: python3 inline PyYAML manifest parse check (failed: system Python environment does not include yaml; covered by uv-run test environment)
